response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of shipping production software, strong TypeScript/Node and AWS experience, high-throughput data systems, and recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the core requirement—8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions—is not met; the candidate's AI/GenAI exposure is recent and tooling-adjacent rather than a deep track record. There is no demonstrated Python, RAG/vector-database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience. Strong engineering foundation and customer-relevant skills make this a borderline case worth a screening conversation to probe depth of AI work.
strengths: 13+ years production engineering, strong TypeScript/Node and AWS (CDK) cloud delivery
Direct MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq, plus data pipelines at massive scale
Bachelor's in CS, proven technical leadership (workshops, mentoring, dev-ops/CI-CD ownership)
concerns: Lacks 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions; AI work is recent and limited
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience
No explicit Python; LLM evaluation/observability and performance optimization not evidenced

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and multi-agent expertise
